sections.title: A: Original passage gap fill practice
sections.instructions: Complete the original passage using the best answers for the gaps.
sections.passage:
Original passage for Review: Block 1 – Units 1 & 2

Mia joined a class project because the group wanted fresh practice for passage gap fill practice. The tutor wrote (1) ...... (2) ...... (3) ...... (4) ...... (5) ...... (6) ...... (7) ...... (8) ...... on the board and asked everyone to explain their choices. Later, the group compared (9) ...... (10) ...... (11) ...... (12) ...... (13) ...... (14) ...... (15) ...... with the rule from the lesson. The text is new, but it practises the same passage gap fill.
